from: debugging task with many noisy text matches
to: repo map -> call trace -> source snippet -> targeted test
action: Start graph navigation and call tracing when broad search returns noisy unrelated hits.
interruption_policy: Do not treat route memory as proof; verify source snippets and targeted tests.

from: user has many tools and asks a broad task
to: classify task -> pick narrow capability -> run bounded verification
action: Use capability routing before asking the user to pick a tool manually.
interruption_policy: If the route requires external writes, run a safety gate before action.

from: momo-tools route result with verification outcome
to: capture event -> memory edge update -> future route suggestion
action: Translate verified route results into capture events before strengthening memory graph edges.
interruption_policy: Keep dry-run output reviewable before writing to long-term memory.
